scripts.install:all: cd order-service && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../notification-service && npm install
scripts.test:all: cd order-service && npm test && cd ../payment-service && npm test && cd ../notification-service && npm test
scripts.test:bdd:all: cd order-service && npm run test:bdd && cd ../payment-service && npm run test:bdd && cd ../notification-service && npm run test:bdd
